items.title: Tensions flare over curling cheating allegations
items.dek: The often-sedate world of curling has gotten heated at the Winter Olympics as cheating allegations and audible curse words overshadowed a feisty match between t
items.body: The often-sedate world of curling has gotten heated at the Winter Olympics as cheating allegations and audible curse words overshadowed a feisty match between two of the best men's teams.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Who's really fastest in 2026? F1's new rules are confusing the pecking order - and the drivers
items.dek: Formula 1's new era was always going to bring questions, but its first week of serious running has raised more than most. With one more preseason test in Bahrai
items.body: Formula 1's new era was always going to bring questions, but its first week of serious running has raised more than most. With one more preseason test in Bahrain still to come, ESPN makes sense of a fascinating three days in Sakhir.
items.author: IriLine Desk
